stemHtml: Which one of the following statements about EGNOS is correct?

options.a: EGNOS can improve accuracy to 0,1 dm horizontally and 0,03 dm vertically.
options.b: With EGNOS installed in an aircraft, the GNSS-reciever can use satellites from all Global Navigation Satellite Systems in order to get better accuracy.
options.c: EGNOS consists of 3 geostationary satellites which broadcast GPS look-alike signals in order to improve accuracy.
options.d: EGNOS is a local area augmentations system operation in North America.
